title: The Fastest Way to Set Up Payment Solutions for Iranian Digital Sellers and Start Selling — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: For Iranian digital sellers, the journey to global exposure and financial freedom is often hindered by stringent payment restrictions. The usual suspects – PayPal, Stripe, and the likes – are off-limits, leaving creators with limited options to monetize their digital products. The uncertainty and frustration are palpable, but there's a solution that can help you bypass these obstacles and start selling today.
What You Can Actually Get Done Today

You can sign up for a NOWPayments account, which serves as the gateway to accepting over 300 cryptocurrencies and fiat currencies from anywhere in the world. This is the foundation upon which you'll build your payment infrastructure. Once you have your NOWPayments account set up, you can move on to integrating the Web3 Wallet Connect, a crucial frontend component that enables users to connect their wallets and complete transactions seamlessly. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you'll be able to create a seamless user experience that converts browsers into buyers. This is a significant step towards receiving payments from anyone, anywhere in the world.
The Minimum Viable Setup That Works

To achieve this setup, you'll need to integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend with your NOWPayments account. This might seem daunting, but the good news is that you can do this without requiring any extensive coding knowledge. The Web3 Wallet Connect dashboard provides an intuitive interface that makes it easy to customize and deploy your payment solution. By combining the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend with the robust backend features of NOWPayments, you'll be able to create a comprehensive payment infrastructure that can handle various payment scenarios and currencies with ease.
Skipping the Steps That Do Not Matter Yet

Don't get bogged down by the intricacies of payment processing or the nuances of cryptocurrency regulations. For now, focus on getting your payment solution up and running, and worry about the finer details later. By prioritizing the minimum viable setup, you'll be able to get your first transaction live sooner rather than later. This will give you the momentum and confidence to tackle more complex aspects of your business as you grow.
Your payment solution is only as strong as its weakest link.
Getting Your First Transaction Live

To get your first transaction live, you'll need to configure your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend to work seamlessly with your NOWPayments account. This involves setting up a test environment, testing your payment flow, and making any necessary adjustments to ensure a smooth user experience. Once you've ironed out the kinks, you'll be ready to receive your first payment and take a major step towards financial freedom.
What to Do in the Next 24 Hours

Within the next 24 hours, focus on setting up your NOWPayments account, integrating the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend, and testing your payment flow. This will give you a solid foundation to build upon and set you up for success. By following these steps, you'll be able to get your payment solution up and running in no time, and start selling your digital products to a global audience.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.
Don't get bogged down by the intricacies of payment processing – focus on getting your payment solution up and running.

Your Action Checklist

To get started with your payment solution, follow these concrete action steps:
Sign up for a NOWPayments account and set up your payment infrastructure.
Integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend with your NOWPayments account.
Configure your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend to work seamlessly with your NOWPayments account.
Test your payment flow to ensure a smooth user experience.
Make any necessary adjustments to your payment solution before going live.
Promote your digital products to a global audience and start receiving payments.
A seamless user experience is key to converting browsers into buyers.
